name: App Shell
description: App layout with sidebar, header, main content, bento blocks, and footer.

name: Bento
description: Viewport and container-aware Bento grids plus auto-grid, switcher, and reel primitives.

name: Semantic Form
description: Accessible forms, Tabs, Accordion, Dropdown, Toast notifications, keyboard navigation, and semantic layout utilities.

name: Fixed Sidebar
description: Fixed rail, accessible off-canvas drawer, and nested modal with top-layer focus and Escape behavior.

name: Dashboard Cards
description: Dashboard metrics, progress, skeletons, badges, alerts, empty states, and a responsive table.

name: Pricing Table
description: Pricing cards with equal rhythm, semantic buttons, and comparison copy.

name: Simple Landing
description: A small landing page with nav, hero, sections, bento cards, and call-to-action links.

name: Portfolio Grid
description: Project gallery using bento sizing, cards, and simple dark visual polish.

name: Settings Panel
description: Admin settings layout with cards, form grid, labels, inputs, select, and buttons.

name: Motion Showcase
description: Rise, fade, pop, lift, glow, and shimmer utilities shown as static page examples.
